creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John W. O'Brien from comment #7)
> [...]

Nice detective work! 

> In retrospect it is clear that building math/gmp with CPU_OPTS on an 
> EC2 m5 instance ("skylake") and then trying to use that package on a
> CPU that has been discontinued for over four years ("sandybridge") was
> probably not a good idea. If folks think I should take additional action 
> here, please say so. Otherwise I think this bug can be closed.

Oh, definitely.  That very much looks like the root cause and is what I
was after when I wrote "Any processor-specific settings?", though I then
had /etc/make.conf or something explicit in mind, not implicit tuning.

Thank you for following up and sharing!
